name: Keller Group plc
summary: Keller Group plc provides geotechnical solutions in North America, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Asia-Pacific. The company offers ground improvement services to prepare the ground for new construction projects and to reduce the risk of liquefaction in the areas of seismic activity; and grouting services, which enhance target areas in the ground, and controls ground water flow through rocks and soils by reducing their permeability. It also provides heavy foundation solutions, including bored, CFA, driven piling, marine, and near shore structures, as well as underpin solutions; and earth retention systems that are used to solve a range of geotechnical solutions comprising slope stabilization and excavation support. In addition, the company offers post-tension cable systems, which are used to reinforce concrete foundations and structural spans; and instrumentation and monitoring solutions for various applications. Keller Group plc provides its services to the construction sector in infrastructure, industrial, commercial residential, and environmental projects. The company was founded in 1860 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
